title: Some update for conformance test
body:
This patch set include following update:
1. README.md for conformance test
2. Update regrex in test "run with JSON"
3. Modify the MakeOptions to
4. Remove docker build image after each test
5. Remove debug line left in the code.

Will do, thanks again for creating it and all of these tests and getting them into upstream.
